title: Bionna
description: Vanilla-like texture with utilities and pretty items
body:
Tired of the vanilla texture but don't want to make the game unrecognizable? This pack enhances the vanilla experience. While not changing too much, still feels that something is very different. Most textures are new, while some is inspired by the game's programmer art or inspired by other resource packs (Paper Cut-Out and Vanilla Tweaks). Ongoing project

### Compatibilities: _(Not required)_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Overflowing Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/overflowing-bars)
- Mods like [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [EntityModelFeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features), [EntityTextureFeatures](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures), [Athena](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena-ctm)/[CTM Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/ctm-refabricated)/[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) and/or [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone).

</details>

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

## General Contents:

- 📋 Overhaul in almost all UIs
- 🧟 Refurbished Entities
- 🔧 Redstone utilities
- ✨ Particles
- ⚔️ Items
- 🧊 Blocks
- ⚖️ Block and item models
- Ⓜ️ Font
- 🛡️ Armor
- 🌙 Environment
